item.title: ApiIntegration Domain — supermodel-api-docs Architecture
item.description: Defines the interface and protocol interaction layers through machine-readable specifications. Architectural overview of the ApiIntegration domain in the supermodel-api-docs codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.description: Manages the framework-specific configuration and structural metadata for the documentation site. Architectural overview of the DocumentationEngine domain in the supermodel-api-docs codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.description: Controls the visual presentation and frontend layer of the documentation interface. Architectural overview of the WebStyling domain in the supermodel-api-docs codebase. Contains 0 source files.
